description_long: This is a realistic adult male figure depicted in a dynamic, crouched pose with one arm extended forward and the other bent above the head, as if bracing or preparing to leap. The figure is anatomically detailed, showing defined musculature, natural body proportions, and lifelike skin texture. The head is turned slightly to the side, with a focused facial expression and short, closely cropped hair. The body is unclothed, revealing the full form and structure of the limbs, torso, and back. The hands are open, fingers splayed, and the feet are bare, with toes gripping the ground for balance. The overall appearance suggests agility and readiness, suitable for urban environments where quick movement or athletic action might occur.
description: A lifelike adult male in a crouched, dynamic pose with arms extended and bare feet, showing detailed musculature and natural proportions.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the face, chest, and both arms extended, with the left arm reaching forward and the right arm bent above the head.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back, shoulders, and the bent right arm raised above the head, with the left arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Direct rear view emphasizing the back muscles, spine, and the full extension of the left leg and arm, with the head slightly turned.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the face in profile, the chest, and the full extension of the left leg and both arms, with the body leaning forward.
attribute_posture: crouching with one arm extended forward and the other raised above the head
